repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five ids address the exact error class: 'class optiling::Ca6k*CustomTilingData has no member named set_*'. The current ca6k_00213 TilingFunc error uses set_totalLength, set_tileLength, etc., which matches the pattern described in each memory. They are from the same op category (torch#1) and tool_mode, and provide the fix: assign directly to members instead of using setter methods. Including multiple diverse ops that suffered the same pattern reinforces the correct approach.
